name: Dyno Nobel Limited.
analysis: DNL has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$3.6947. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$3.7448 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$3.6947, stop A$3.5016, target A$4.0809. Risk/reward is 2.00:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
